hero.eyebrow: Natural tomato and pepper breeding, big flavor
hero.heading: Buy tomatoes that melt in your mouth.
hero.lead: We cultivate resilient heritage lines and starter plants adapted for our climate. From seed to harvest, we offer you the best tomato.

items.title: Starter Plants
items.description: Greenhouse-hardened seedlings of our proprietary breeding lines, ready for transplant. Ships in spring.

items.title: Fresh Heirloom Tomatoes
items.description: Peak-season heritage varieties handpicked at optimal ripeness. Available July–September at regional markets.

items.title: Breeding Consultation
items.description: Expert guidance on selecting open-pollinated varieties or starting your own breeding program. Remote or on-site visits.

items.title: Proven genetics
items.description: Multi-year selection for flavor, yield, and disease resistance in local climate.

items.title: Organic practices
items.description: No synthetic pesticides or fertilizers; soil health and biodiversity first.

items.title: Locally adapted
items.description: Bred and trialed on-site to thrive in our region's unique growing conditions.

items.title: Passionate growers
items.description: Family-run nursery dedicated to preserving heirloom flavor and open-pollinated seed.
